text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of summer camp—a
training camp where many Umamusume come
together to hone their skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the perfect chance to train Air Groove for the
upcoming Shuka Sho. Naturally, my motivation is
at an all-time high, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You there—halt! We haven't done roll call yet, so
don't go wandering off!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Honestly... Why do none of you seem to realize that we are not here for fun and games?!
choice_data_list: Looks like she's got a lot on her plate...
Looks like she's got a lot on her plate...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Even at summer camp, the student council takes a
leading role. With students getting carried away
in the beach setting, we end up even busier than
usual.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But you can rest easy. I have no intention of
cutting into our valuable training time.
choice_data_list: Yeah, gotta make the most of our time here!
Yeah, gotta make the most of our time here!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's the ideal opportunity to prepare for the Shuka
Sho, so we must—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You there! Who said you could go into the
bunks? What class are you in?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove seems to have her hands full from day
one, but our summer camp is finally here!
